extraction.one_line_summary: MERLIER Tim won UAE Tour Stage 6 sprint by exploiting barrier-side opening after pre-race reconnaissance revealed optimal positioning in technical finish.
tactical_patterns: Soudal Quick-Step pre-race recon identified barrier-side positioning advantage in technical finale, Merlier executed perfectly despite boxed rivals.
Late puncture for Cavendish and boxed Kooij/Groenewegen reveals positioning chaos in last 2km technical pinch points.
Blanket secured intermediate sprint jersey by contesting both sprints from three-man break, Zacorato gifted second sprint.

rider_signals.MERLIER Tim: positive: Delivered second stage win via recon-based positioning intelligence, clearly superior sprint train execution versus disorganized rivals
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: negative: Late rear puncture ruined sprint chance, Astana lead-out disrupted multiple consecutive stages
rider_signals.KOOIJ Olav: negative: Boxed and harried again, third straight stage unable to find clean position despite team strength
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: negative: Full bike length behind despite opening, still winless with only one stage remaining
